response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C++ in an embedded context. However, his recent work primarily focuses on web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and emerging technologies (AI agents, MCP), with limited evidence of deep C++ expertise, industrial automation, or cloud platform development required for this role. His industrial cybersecurity and SDL experience is also not clearly demonstrated.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with C++ (National Instruments, embedded systems)
Strong background in software architecture, design patterns, and test-driven development (TDD)
Proven track record of building scalable, high-performance applications (e.g., low-latency systems, micro-services)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant C++ work was in 2015; recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js)
No clear exposure to IEC 62443 or industrial cybersecurity standards in listed roles
No demonstrable experience with cloud platforms (e.g., Azure) or industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA)

key_factors.factor: Recent relevance of work to role requirements
